# LoopWorker

LoopWorker is a founder-led market intelligence studio that pulls public signals around a business decision and returns a PDF brief with a ranked next move.

## What it does
We pull live, public market signals (competitor pricing pages, scraped competitor positioning surface, search demand, ad creative, customer language, channel cadence, founder-vs-team visibility, proof gaps) across 10 competitors at once, then return a decision brief that says exactly what to ship, hold, or kill.

Operating principle: Evidence before execution. The signals are already public. Most businesses just don't read them.

## Sprint ladder (4 tiers)
- Surface · $750 · 48 hours · Quick look. One signal pulled deep + 3 next-move recommendations. Money back if not useful.
- Compass · $3,200 · 10 days · Focused answer. One big question, fully answered. Competitor read + clear answer + ranked action.
- Atlas · $8,000 · 21 days · The full picture. 10 competitors, customer language, pricing, channels, ranked actions, 30-min walkthrough. Default tier (70% of clients).
- Operating System · $25,000 · 30 days + 3 months execution · Big bet. Everything in Atlas + positioning rebuild + 90-day social roadmap + execution playbook + 3 months support.
- Systems Retainer · $4,500/month · Post-Sprint execution. Month-to-month.

Guarantee: 14-day refund. If you can't act on a single line of the brief, write back.

## Who it's for
- SaaS founders deciding on pricing, positioning, channel, or repositioning before a raise or rebuild
- DTC + ecommerce brands planning launches, rebrands, or channel scale
- Service businesses choosing a niche, raising rates, or differentiating from the field
- Creators + founder-led brands deciding on platform, monetization, or positioning
- Operators with $50K+ at stake on a near-term decision

Not for: org-wide transformations, M&A advisory, mass-market survey research, software vendors looking for outsourced content.

## How it compares
- vs strategy consultant: Consultants give opinions over 6-12 weeks for $25K-$150K. LoopWorker gives signals + decisions in 48 hours to 30 days for $750-$25K.
- vs research agency: Agencies deliver findings in 6-10 weeks. LoopWorker delivers decisions in 48 hours to 30 days.
- vs in-house: One signal done right is 12-20 senior hours across 10 competitors. Seven signals = 80-150 hours. A Sprint compresses 3-4 weeks of in-house research into 14-21 days.

## Key definitions
- Signal intelligence: pulling visible public market evidence (scraped competitor pages, ads, search, pricing pages, customer language) into a working view before making positioning, pricing, proof, channel, or execution decisions.
- Decision brief: a short PDF document that ranks a business's next move and shows the evidence behind every recommendation. Not a research report. Not a deck.
- Action sheet: the ranked, dated, owner-named list of next moves attached to every Sprint brief.
- Visibility system: an organized view of category evidence that makes the next business move easier to defend.

## What LoopWorker is NOT
- Not a generic content/posting vendor
- Not a freelancer or marketing agency
- Not a production shop
- Not a SaaS dashboard
- Not a strategy consultancy that sells decks

## Founder
Alex Lamb. Two active Atlas engagements at a time so the work stays founder-led.
